key_findings: INSERT-only, single-row constant, NOT-EXISTS dedup, idempotent; rollback = only DELETE, promotion-guarded fail-closed
Pre-state clean: 0 collisions (id/key/sha/storage); pool exactly 5 == the 5 governed keys in rank order
Pool neutrality PROVEN from live function bodies (is_active first filter in resolve_slot_assets; hard WHERE in resolve_brand_assets)
Marker+pool+governed-set assertion scoping ruled sound vs brittle total-count (concurrent lanes active)
LOW: pool replica omits license_expires_at/platform_scope (vacuous on live pool; re-cut if a pool row ever carries either)
LOW: apply fails closed if run before upload (by design; target verified absent)
